title: 150 PCS Artificial Daisy Flower Heads, Colorful Silk Daisy Flowers Head 4cm Mini Fake Fabric Flowers for DIY Crafts Wreath Gift Wedding Decoration
features: What You Get: Comes with 150 pieces mini silk flowers in 14 colors, including white, red, green, rose red, blue, etc. White flower has 20 pieces, and each of other flower has 10 pieces. Rich colors and enough quantities can meet your different DIY needs.

Premium Material: Faux flower heads are made of high-quality silk, excellent workmanship, bright colors, soft and realistic, durable and reusable, not easy to break or fade. The stems are made of high-quality plastic, can be used with the flower line pole.

Realistic Appearance: Artificial daisy flower heads are designed with 2-layer petals and cute flower core, vivid and realistic, colorful and beautiful. Perfect for home and party decoration, and adding more romance and surprise to daily life.

Easy To DIY: Each mini fake flower head has a short hollow stem for easy attachment, and you can also cut off the back of the flower for other demands. The diameter of daisy flowers fake is 4cm, tiny and exquisite.

Wide Application: Artificial flower heads are suitable for DIY bouquets, garlands, hair clips, invitation cards, scrapbooking, photo frame and other crafts. Perfect decoration for home, wedding, baby shower, kitchen tea party, etc.
